name: Hou Node Exists
description: Check if a node exists at the specified path in the Houdini scene.
python_code:
async def execute(self, inputs):
    from src.utils.hou_bridge import get_bridge

    path = inputs.get('node_path') or self.get_parameter('node_path', '')
    if not path:
        await self.set_output('exists', False)
        await self.set_output('exec_out', True)
        return {'exists': False}

    try:
        bridge = get_bridge()
        result = bridge.node_exists(path)
        exists = result.get('exists', False)
        self.log_info(f'{path} exists: {exists}')
        await self.set_output('exists', exists)
    except Exception as e:
        self.log_error(f'Failed to check node: {e}')
        await self.set_output('exists', False)

    await self.set_output('exec_out', True)
    return {'exists': self.get_parameter('exists', False)}
